# Q3 regextract IPv4 (one capture group) (regex log extraction)

**Dataset**: `gx_09_logs` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Regex extraction from free-text log fields with regextract. Q3 regextract IPv4 (one capture group). `split()` carves the delimited field into an array, `arrayindex()` picks an element (negative index = from the end); `regextract()` captures one RE2 group from a text field.

```sql
dataset = gx_09_logs | alter ip = arrayindex(regextract(line, "(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)"), 0) | fields line, ip
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 14). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
